headlines.title: U.S. bears brunt of Israel’s missile defense, Pentagon assessments show
headlines.summary: Amid hostilities with Iran, the American military expended far more advanced interceptors to protect Israel than Israeli forces did, according to Defense Department data.

headlines.title: In rare clash, North Korea defeats South Korea … on the soccer field
headlines.summary: In an inter-peninsula match-up between women's teams that showed the limits of sports diplomacy, players from North Korea remained stone-faced — until they won.

headlines.title: Ebola responders say aid cuts by Western nations left them ill-equipped for outbreak
headlines.summary: The sweeping aid cuts have left the Democratic Republic of Congo struggling to contain an Ebola outbreak despite its extensive experience with the disease.

headlines.title: As U.S. war redraws Middle East, Turkey braces for rivalry with Israel
headlines.summary: Amid the unpredictability of President Trump's Middle East policies, Turkey is calling for “regional ownership” and pursuing new security pacts.

headlines.title: Putin, Xi signal unity but fail to reach deal on pipeline sought by Russia
headlines.summary: The Power of Siberia 2 pipeline could carry 50 billion cubic meters of Russian natural gas annually to China.

headlines.title: Turkish court ousts leader of main opposition party
headlines.summary: Ankara court overturns results of leadership election won by Republican People's Party head Ozgur Ozel.

headlines.title: US Senate pushes back against Trump’s $1.8bn ‘anti-weaponisation’ fund
headlines.summary: The Senate delayed a vote on immigration enforcement funds in a rare show of dissent ahead of its Memorial Day recess.

headlines.title: ‘Intense mediation’: Signs of progress amid efforts to reach US-Iran deal
headlines.summary: A new opinion poll in the US suggests that 60 percent of Americans now oppose President Donald Trump's war on Iran.

headlines.title: US says it has not changed its stance on sanctioning Francesca Albanese
headlines.summary: The Trump administration had sanctioned the UN expert for her criticism of Israel's policies towards Palestinians.

headlines.title: Over 2,000 gather in San Diego to mourn three men killed in mosque attack
headlines.summary: The three men killed in the shooting at the Islamic Center of San Diego were remembered as heroes at the memorial.

headlines.title: NASCAR superstar Kyle Busch dies at 41 after hospitalization with 'severe illness'
headlines.summary: Kyle Busch, who won more races than anyone across NASCAR's three national series, has died at 41. A joint statement from the Busch Family, Richard Childress Racing and NASCAR said he died after being hospitalized.

headlines.title: Trump's towering arch clears another federal hurdle, despite public pushback
headlines.summary: The Commission of Fine Arts gave the arch design its final approval, even though it's missing some visual components. The president said Thursday that he doesn't need approval from Congress.

headlines.title: American passenger feels 'betrayed' by federal order to stay in hantavirus quarantine
headlines.summary: Two passengers from the cruise ship that had a hantavirus outbreak were blocked by the federal government from leaving the quarantine unit. One says she is being detained against her will.

headlines.title: Senate Republicans rebel against Trump's $1.8 trillion fund
headlines.summary: In a rare rebuke, Senate Republicans postponed a vote to fund immigration enforcement amid alarm over the novel fund

headlines.title: Palestinians drop bid for a senior U.N. role after U.S. pressure
headlines.summary: The Palestinian delegation to the United Nations has dropped its bid to secure a top U.N. job after the U.S. threatens to revoke their visas.

headlines.title: China and Pakistan eye stronger ties
headlines.summary: President Xi Jinping called on Thursday for stronger strategic communication, continued traditional friendship and deeper all-around cooperation between China and Pakistan, as the two Asian neighbors marked the 75th anniversary of diplomatic ties.

headlines.title: Sino-Russian statements help shore up unity, stability
Long-standing Sino-Pakistani relationship valued
headlines.summary: As China and Pakistan marked the 75th anniversary of diplomatic ties on Thursday, political leaders, diplomats and analysts in Pakistan have highlighted the longstanding, multifaceted Sino-Pakistani relationship, emphasizing its economic, social, cultural and diplomatic dimensions.

headlines.title: WHO warns conflict, displacement hastening spread of Ebola
headlines.summary: Conflict and large-scale displacement in the eastern part of Democratic Republic of the Congo, or DRC, are severely complicating efforts to contain a growing Ebola outbreak caused by the rare Bundibugyo virus strain, the World Health Organization has said, warning that insecurity, population movement, and overstretched health systems are hampering surveillance and response operations in one of Central Africa's most volatile regions.

headlines.title: China's UN envoy urges protection of civilians
headlines.summary: China called for ceasefires, political dialogue and civilian protection during a UN Security Council annual debate on the protection of civilians on Wednesday, as the United Nations reported rising civilian deaths, displacement and attacks on hospitals in conflicts worldwide.

headlines.title: Mirwaiz, Sajad Lone placed under house arrest on fathers’ death anniversaries
headlines.summary: Sajad Lone's house arrest on his father's death anniversary condemned as undemocratic by the People's Conference in Srinagar.

headlines.title: Sedition trials can go on if accused is willing: Supreme Court
headlines.summary: Supreme Court allows sedition trials to proceed if accused has no objection, four years after initial hold on cases.

headlines.title: Manipur Police recover weapons, including looted police weapons, from cadres of armed group
headlines.summary: Manipur Police recover 67 weapons from UNLF(P) cadres, including looted police arms, during a covert operation in Imphal.

headlines.title: Victims have long been ‘pushed into a corner’, says Supreme Court
headlines.summary: Supreme Court prioritizes victims' rights, denies plea to consolidate FIRs in major fraud case involving ₹49 crore.

headlines.title: Row over Vande Mataram being made mandatory in West Bengal’s madrasas
headlines.summary: West Bengal mandates singing 'Vande Mataram' in all madrasas, aligning with state-run schools to promote national integration.

headlines.title: US House Republicans cancel Iran war powers vote
headlines.summary: Republican leaders of the U.S. House of Representatives unexpectedly canceled a vote on Thursday on a resolution seeking to end the Iran war ​unless President Donald Trump obtains Congress' authorization, two days after a similar ‌measure advanced in the U.S. Senate.

headlines.title: Official warns US could halt immigration, customs processing at 'sanctuary city' airports, sources say
headlines.summary: Homeland Security Secretary Markwayne ​Mullin privately warned that authorities could stop processing international travelers ‌and cargo at major U.S. airports in "sanctuary cities" that have declined to cooperate with the Trump administration's immigration crackdown, sources told Reuters.

headlines.title: Trump says US will send additional 5,000 troops to Poland
headlines.summary: The United States will be sending an additional 5,000 troops ​to Poland, U.S. President Donald Trump said on ‌Thursday.

headlines.title: Greenlanders demonstrate against Trump as US diplomats open new consulate
headlines.summary: The U.S. opening of a larger diplomatic hub in Greenland on Thursday was met by demonstrators opposed to President Donald Trump's ambition for greater ​influence in the Arctic island, while local government ministers shied away from ‌the event.

headlines.title: Democrats release ‘autopsy’ on 2024 US election loss but reject findings
headlines.summary: Bowing to pressure from within its ranks, the Democratic National Committee released on ​Thursday its long‑withheld “autopsy” of Kamala Harris’ loss to Donald Trump in the 2024 presidential race — only ‌to quickly disavow it.

markets.label: Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS

hackerNews.title: Project Hail Mary – Stellar Navigation Chart
hackerNews.summary: See a recreation of the Project Hail Mary in-ship navigation computer with accurate star data from the GAIA DR3 mission.

hackerNews.title: Blog ran on Ubuntu 16.04 for 10 years. I migrated it to FreeBSD
hackerNews.summary: After a decade on Ubuntu 16.04, I migrated my blog to FreeBSD on Hetzner. Some notes on setting up a VPS with FreeBSD, Jails, Bastille, Caddy reverse proxies, and load testing and benchmarking the blog from four continents.

hackerNews.title: Using Kagi Search with Low Vision
hackerNews.summary: How I'm using Kagi Search with low vision to manage visual fatigue, plus my favorite Kagi accessibility features for low vision + CVI and Kagi low vision theme

hackerNews.title: Uv is fantastic, but its package management UX is a mess
Show HN: Freenet, a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized apps
hackerNews.summary: Freenet is a peer-to-peer platform for decentralized applications: communication, collaboration, and commerce without reliance on big tech. Your computer becomes part of a global network where apps are unstoppable, interoperable, and built on open protocols.

hackerNews.title: Indexing a year of video locally on a 2021 MacBook with Gemma4-31B (50GB swap)
hackerNews.summary: How I built a queryable video archive locally on a 2021 MacBook Pro M1 Max using Gemma 4 31B in LM Studio. The build journey, the absurdity of 50GB of swap, and four bugs that taught real lessons.

hackerNews.title: The IBM-ification of Google?
hackerNews.summary: I used to think Google owning the full vertical stack was a masterstroke. Like TSMC silicon, TPUs, their own data centers, proprietary models, search engine....

hackerNews.title: Samsung chip workers will get an average $340k bonus as AI profits soar
hackerNews.summary: qz.com: Samsung chip workers will get an average $340k bonus as AI profits soar.

hackerNews.title: Python 3.15: features that didn't make the headlines
Lost Images from the 1945 Trinity Nuclear Test Restored
hackerNews.summary: Forgotten photos of the Trinity detonation show the immensity of the project

summarySections.title: News and markets

Markets leaned higher, with 4 of 7 tracked indexes up; Nikkei 225 up 2.29% was the largest move.
Benchmarks tracked: S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, Euronext 100 Index, and Public Joint-Stock Company Moscow Exchange MICEX-RTS plus 3 more indexes.
